description: Absolute memory budget ceilings for memcheck regression gating. Single source of truth consumed by cargo xtask memcheck and CI. Tightened to C-phase band after Plan 3 worker-aware memory accounting. Combined ceilings apply to main+worker RSS during worker-active phases.

idle_warm.description: After C: 102400 KiB (100 MiB). Main daemon idle.

index.description: After C: 307200 KiB (300 MiB). Main daemon indexing.

idle_post.description: After C: 102400 KiB (100 MiB). Main daemon idle post-index.

query.description: After C: 184320 KiB (180 MiB). Main daemon query.

reindex.description: After C: 307200 KiB (300 MiB). Main daemon reindexing.

idle_final.description: After C: 102400 KiB (100 MiB). Main daemon idle final.

embed_idle.description: After C: 102400 KiB (100 MiB). Main daemon idle before embed demand. No worker spawned yet.

embed_active.description: After C: 102400 KiB (100 MiB). Main daemon during worker-active embedding. Worker carries the model residency.

embed_teardown.description: After C: 102400 KiB (100 MiB). Main daemon idle after worker teardown. Worker process should be gone.
